description: Configure GPredict for an astrophotography session at Mauna Kea to photograph space stations transiting the night sky. Create a ground station named 'MaunaKea' (19.8206 N, 155.4681 W, 4205 meters altitude, weather station PHSF) and set it as the default ground station. Configure the Pass Predictor to generate 20 optimal night passes with a minimum elevation of 35 degrees and a maximum sun elevation of -12 degrees. Create a tracking module named 'Astro_Targets' containing ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849). Ensure GPredict is configured to display UTC time globally. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
